titleStmt.title: SII 8.263: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 263. (A.R. No. 658 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE KAILASANATHA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamu
m karuvūrum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiya
virābhiṣe kamum vijayābhiṣe kamum paṇṇiyaruḷi
na tirupuvanavirade vaṟkku yāṇṭu yirupat
tonpatāvatu nāḷ munnūṟṟu Āṟināl prasā
da mceytaruḷiya tirumukappaṭi coḻaśi kāmaṇi
p pallavaraiyaṉ ceyyattiruvāymalaṉtaruḷinapaṭi rājendra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu muṭivaḻaṅkucoḻaccaturvve timaṅkalam kuṭimai koḷḷumiṭattu Ivvūr tirappillāmal kācu pottakappaṭi nilattukkuk koḷḷilttiṭ
ṭum meṉṟum kūṭiṉa Ūrkaḷāl payirukku Oṉṟu compātiyāl vaṉta nilattukkuk koḷḷakkaṭavatāka Aṇṇavāyal Uṭaiyār kāṅkayarāyaṉ niccayittukkoṇṭu vārāniṉṟa teṉṟum Ippaṭi koḷḷakkaṭavatākap
peṟaveṇu menṟum nantipaṉ(m)maṉ Irupattiraṇṭāvatiṉ nāḷil namakkuc coṉnavāṟey Ippaṭi koḷḷavum kaṇakkilum Iṭṭuk koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varikkūṟu cey(v)vārkaḷukkum colla kāṭṭāḷkkācu 2 100 5
Ippaṭi kuṭimaikaḷ Irupatteṭṭāvatu varaiyum Ippaṭi taṇṭi varaccitey Irupattonpatāvutukkuk kāṭṭāḷukku taṇṭi niccayitta kācu pottakappaṭi nilattukku Iṟukkaveṇu menṟu nalavuceyyāni
ṉṟāṉ Enṟum Irupatteṭṭāvatu varaiyum koṇṭuvantapaṭiye koḷḷakkaṭavatākap peṟaveṇu menṟu Ivan ṉamakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac conṉom . Ippaṭi ceyyappaṭuva
tu . Eḻutināṉ tirumantiraolai rājanārāyaṇa muventaveḷā neḻu m Iṉ Eḻut teṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻiṉtanaṉ Ivai villavarāyan Eḻut tenṟum Ivai toṇṭaimān Eḻut tenṟum Ivai Anakarāyan Eḻu
t tenṟum Ivai viḻiñattarayan Eḻut tenṟum Ivai ciṅkaḷarāyan Eḻut tenṟum Eḻutiṉa tirumukappaṭi .
Digital edition of SII 8.263 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
